parts.text: My creatinine was 90 on 2026-02-01 and 130 on 2026-02-02. Should I be concerned?
I had a vomiting bug. Creatinine 85 on 5 March, then 115 on 6 March. What does that mean?
Creatinine 100 on 2026-04-01 and 155 on 2026-04-05. Is this a problem?
My kidney blood test went from 70 to 140 in three days. I've been very unwell with a chest infection.
Creatinine 120 on 2026-05-10, then 148 on 2026-05-11. My eGFR dropped too.
I got dehydrated on holiday. Creatinine was 95 before, 125 the next day. Should I do anything?
